nasb.text: And He closed the book, gave it back to the attendant and sat down; and the eyes of all in the synagogue were fixed on Him.

esv.text: And he rolled up the scroll and gave it back to the attendant and sat down. And the eyes of all in the synagogue were fixed on him.

cnv.text: 他把書卷捲好，交還侍役，就坐下。會堂裡眾人都注視他。

ccb.text: 耶稣读完便收好书卷，还给负责的人，然后坐下。会堂里的人都把目光集中在祂身上。

csbs.text: 然后耶稣把书卷好，还给会堂助理，坐了下来。会堂里，众人的眼睛都注视着他。
